differential_diagnoses: Septic embolization (e.g., to coronary arteries or other end organs)
next_steps: Perform urgent transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for vegetation and aortic involvement
Obtain repeat CT angiography of the chest and abdomen with specialized focus on the aorta to assess for pseudoaneurysm enlargement or rupture
Consult infectious disease for optimization of targeted intravenous antibiotic therapy
Consult vascular surgery for urgent evaluation regarding potential surgical or endovascular repair of the aortic lesion
Continue serial blood cultures and monitor inflammatory markers
